Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark hair, wearing a black leather jacket, a black t-shirt, black cargo shorts, white socks, and chunky white sneakers, stands leaning against the hood of a silver BMW sedan. He holds a red smartphone in his right hand. The car is parked on a cobblestone sidewalk next to a street. In the background, a bright green hatchback car is driving on the street, with a motorcyclist behind it. Several other vehicles and motorcycles are visible further down the road, and there are streetlights and buildings lining the street. The lighting suggests it's late afternoon or early evening, with a slightly warm glow. The overall mood is casual and urban. The color palette consists of muted grays and silvers from the cars and buildings, contrasted with the vibrant green of the hatchback and the red of the phone. The image has a realistic, photographic style.
